summary: Wrapper defaults should stay transparent: pure MCP config delegation, executable pipx upgrades, visible dry-run upgrade intent, value-form flag detection, and printed root errors.
reason: The companion must remain predictable for agents: it should not inject undocumented MCP arguments, punt explicit pipx upgrade execution, silently ignore install preview flags, duplicate passthrough flags supplied as --flag=value, or hide Cobra/root errors.
validated_outcome: `go test ./...` verifies flag detection, MCP argument construction, pipx upgrade invocation, and root error-print filtering.
